title: Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Lübeck, Schleswig-Holstein: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Lübeck is a city in Schleswig-Holstein with a population of 216,000. The Queen of the Hanseatic League, a UNESCO-listed medieval gem on the Baltic, famous for its brick Gothic architecture and marzipan.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
